fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is positioned as a leveraged volatility strategy, often discussed as a surrogate for S&P 500 put options for hedging purposes in uncertain times. While recent articles highlight its utility for bears and as a unique hedging tool, they also caution that "good things do not last," suggesting a need for careful management of this leveraged product. The ETF's nature implies its performance is tied to market downturns and increased volatility.
